options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -addInst
options.description: Specifies whether timing optimizer is allowed to add buffer/delay/inverter cell instances.

options.name: -addLoad
options.description: Specifies whether Hold optimizer is allowed to add dummy cell instances

options.name: -allowSkewing
options.description: useful skew based setup opt

options.name: -alongRouteBuffering
options.description: Allow buffer/inverter to be inserted along the route and not only at driver or sink terms.

options.name: -bufferCellList
options.description: Specifies a list of buffer/delay cells that can be used for DRV and Hold optimizers, regardless of whether those cells have a "dont_use" attribute.

options.name: -checkType
options.description: Check type for path based analysis.

options.name: -clockCellList
options.description: Restricts the list of buffers/inverter/gating cells that are allowed to be used by ECO on the clock tree.

options.name: -clockMaxLevel
options.description: max level allowed for clock tree

options.name: -deleteInst
options.description: delete buffer for optimization

options.name: -disableGeometryChecks
options.description: Performs Vth swapping without checking pins geometry.

options.name: -drvMargin
options.description: Specifies a margin value by which ratio the drv check would be relaxed or tightened

options.name: -ecoFilePrefix
options.description: Specifies the prefix name for the ECO files generated.

options.name: -emType
options.description: Specifies the current waveform calculation method when doing EM fixing.

options.name: -fixCellEm
options.description: Enables Cell EM violations fixing during DRV optimization.

options.name: -fixClockDrv
options.description: fix max_cap/max_tran violations on clock nets

options.name: -fixDataDrv
options.description: fix max_cap/max_tran violations on data nets

options.name: -fixGlitch
options.description: fix nets with glitch

options.name: -fixHoldAllowSetupDegrade
options.description: Allow setup slack fixing in hold fixing.

options.name: -fixHoldAllowSetupOptimization
options.description: simultaneous hold and setup fixing

options.name: -fixHoldAllowSetupTnsDegrade
options.description: When active, the Setup Total Negative Slack can be degraded during Hold time violations fixing while still maintaining the Setup Worst Negative Slack in every Setup active views.

options.name: -fixHoldVariationAware
options.description: Variation aware hold fixing.

options.name: -fixHoldWithMargin
options.description: Specifies a slack margin value in nanoseconds for Hold time violations fixing. The purpose is to overfix any Hold violations by the amount of the margin value. This margin is not applied on nets that are already meeting the Hold target slack.

options.name: -fixIrDrop
options.description: fix ir-drop hotspots

options.name: -fixMaxCap
options.description: Enables max_cap violations fixing during DRV optimization.

options.name: -fixMaxTran
options.description: Enables max_tran violations fixing during DRV optimization.

options.name: -fixOsusGlitch
options.description: fix nets with osus glitch

options.name: -fixSiSlew
options.description: Performs SI Slew fixing during DRV fixing using resizing and buffering techniques.

options.name: -fixSlackInRangeLowerLimit
options.description: Sets the lower slack limit for a violated path to be considered during timing closure.

options.name: -fixSlackInRangeUpperLimit
options.description: Sets the upper slack limit for a violated path to be considered during timing closure.

options.name: -fixXtalk
options.description: Reduces the crosstalk on the net that violates the thresholds set by the user.

options.name: -fixXtalkPreserveHold
options.description: preserve hold slack in xtalk fixing

options.name: -fixXtalkPreserveSetup
options.description: preserve setup slack in xtalk fixing

options.name: -holdTargetSlack
options.description: Specifies a target slack value in nanoseconds for hold timing optimize

options.name: -holdTargetSlackPerView
options.description: Specifies view-wise target slack values in nanoseconds for hold timing optimization

options.name: -holdXtalkDeltaThreshold
options.description: Crosstalk delta delay threshold for selecting nets in hold timing views when running Xtalk fixing.

options.name: -holdXtalkSlackThreshold
options.description: Slack threshold for selecting nets in hold timing views when running Xtalk fixing.

options.name: -ignoreDrvChecks
options.description: Ignores DRV checks during timing/area/power optimization.

options.name: -keepTempFiles
options.description: To keep all the temporary files generated by D-MMMC and Tempus clients for debugging purposes.

options.name: -legalOnly
options.description: Enables/disables legal location checks during resizing and buffering

options.name: -loadCellList
options.description: Specifies the list of load cells

options.name: -loadEcoOptDb
options.description: Path of directory where ECO Timing DB files must be loaded from.

options.name: -loadIrdropDb
options.description: Path of directory where command debug_irdrop generated IR drop DB files are kept

options.name: -maxCapMargin
options.description: Specifies the ratio by which the max_cap check would be relaxed or tightened

options.name: -maxLocalDensity
options.description: threshold value for local density check. To enable give a value more than 0

options.name: -maxOptRunTime
options.description: If set to a positive value, would restrict the optimization runtime by that value, in minutes.

options.name: -maxPaths
options.description: Specifies how many paths are getting retimed for ECO DB generation in PBA mode.

options.name: -maxRunTime
options.description: If set to a positive value, would restrict the command runtime by that value, in minutes.

options.name: -maxSlack
options.description: Specifies the maximum GBA slack value to be used when selecting paths to be retimed for ECO DB generation in PBA mode.

options.name: -maxTranMargin
options.description: Specifies the ratio by which the max_tran check would be relaxed or tightened

options.name: -numReportPaths
options.description: Number of paths printed after signoff timing analysis per view

options.name: -nworst
options.description: Specifies the number of paths to be retimed per endpoints for ECO DB generation in PBA mode.

options.name: -optimizeCoreOnly
options.description: Enables the tool to optimize timing or recover area/power only on register to register paths.

options.name: -optimizeReplicatedModules
options.description: Allows the tool to perform timing optimization inside replicated hierarchies while generating only one ECO file per sets of clones. The cell name of the replicated hierarchies have to be listed in a file pointed by the -partitionListFile option.

options.name: -optimizeSequentialCells
options.description: Specifies whether the timing/area/power optimizer is allowed to optimize sequential cells.

options.name: -partitionListFile
options.description: File containing list of partitions in the design

options.name: -pbaEcoRoute
options.description: Enables PBA timing to be passed to ecoRoute for higher timing driven routing accuracy

options.name: -pbaEffort
options.description: When enabling "high" effort mode, all the optimization engines will perform more aggressive timing closure or area/power recovery with respect to PBA timing and the expectation is to get better quality of results.

options.name: -postMask
options.description: enable post mask ECO mode

options.name: -postStaTcl
options.description: File containing the TCL code that will be executed immediately after signoff timing analysis per view

options.name: -powerAware
options.description: power awareness in all optimizers and transforms

options.name: -powerOptFocus
options.description: focus for power optimization

options.name: -prefixName
options.description: Specifies the prefix to be assigned to the new instances inserted.

options.name: -preserveFiller
options.description: To enable preserve and restore of fillers

options.name: -preStaTcl
options.description: File containing the TCL code that will be executed immediately prior to signoff timing analysis per view

options.name: -resizeInst
options.description: enable/disable resizing transform

options.name: -retime
options.description: To enable PBA-based timing report and optimization for of all optimizers.

options.name: -retimeDepth
options.description: Retime depth for exhaustive path based analysis.

options.name: -retimeDepthEarly
options.description: Retime depth for exhaustive path based early analysis.

options.name: -retimeMode
options.description: Retime mode for path based analysis.

options.name: -routeCongestionThreshold
options.description: threshold value for route congestion buffering, value between 0 and 1

options.name: -routingCongestionAware
options.description: Check routing congestion before adding buffers

options.name: -saveEcoOptDb
options.description: Path of directory where ECO Timing DB files are saved.

options.name: -selectDrvNetFile
options.description: list of nets to be optimized during DRV fixing

options.name: -selectDrvPinFile
options.description: list of pins to be optimized during DRV fixing

options.name: -selectHoldEndpoints
options.description: select end points for hold fixing

options.name: -selectSetupEndpoints
options.description: select end points for setup fixing

options.name: -setupRecovery
options.description: Forces Setup fixing to perform Setup timing recovery by using Vth swapping only. Useful feature to recover timing degradation after large ECO change during Power optimization.

options.name: -setupTargetSlack
options.description: Specifies a target slack value in nanoseconds for setup timing optimize

options.name: -setupTargetSlackPerView
options.description: Specifies view-wise target slack values in nanoseconds for setup timing optimization

options.name: -setupXtalkDeltaThreshold
options.description: Crosstalk delta delay threshold for selecting nets in setup timing views when running Xtalk fixing.

options.name: -setupXtalkSlackThreshold
options.description: Slack threshold for selecting nets in setup timing views when running Xtalk fixing.

options.name: -skewCoreOnly
options.description: dont skew flops which eventually launches/captures any IO path

options.name: -skipDrvNetFile
options.description: list of nets to be excluded during DRV fixing

options.name: -specifyHoldEndpointsMargin
options.description: specify end point specific margin for hold fixing

options.name: -specifySetupEndpointsMargin
options.description: specify end point specific margin for setup fixing

options.name: -swapInst
options.description: Enables/disables VT swap resizing. Setup/leakage optimizers do not honor this option and always perform VT-swapping.

options.name: -upsizeInPowerOpt
options.description: Allow upsizing of cells for total power

options.name: -useGaFillerList
options.description: original of enable post mask mode to use cells from the specified list at GA filler sites

options.name: -usePfcDecapList
options.description: Specify list of PF decap cells that are allowed to be removed in post mask mode

options.name: -usePfcFillerList
options.description: Specify list of PF filler cells that are allowed to be removed/reinserted in post mask mode

options.name: -usePfcRegularList
options.description: Specify list of PF filler logic/ECO cells that are allowed to be used during optimization in post mask mode

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Specifies whether the command should output log file reporting with verbosity or not.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
